video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. The staircase is narrow. The wall is covered with children's height marks, each dated the same day. Narration: "楼梯很窄，墙面贴着儿童身高线，每一道都写着同一天日期。". Protagonist A says: "为什么都是同一天？". Camera motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action. Medium shot of a narrow staircase descending into darkness, wall covered with children's height marks all dated the same day, eerie repetition, dim light from above, claustrophobic, unsettling atmosphere. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S029/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
